name: Universal Chassis Core
rule: The heart of your mech. Every mech must have exactly one. It acts as the central structural anchor for all your parts and provides your Base HP pool. If your mech reaches 0 HP, your mech is destroyed. When you lose HP, place tokens at your mech's feet.
medium:
• Required: every mech needs one.
• Provides Base HP.
• Tokens placed at feet when lost.

name: Articulated Hinge
rule: Links two connectors at a custom angle. Use during the Assembly Phase to create unique firing arcs or wrap armor around your Core. No in-game rules — pure structural flexibility.
medium:
• Expands building possibilities.
• Allows angled limbs and cover wrapping.

name: Extension Strut
rule: Extends the length of arms and legs. Increases manipulator reach and allows weapons to fire around cover without exposing your center of mass.
medium:
• Extends limb reach.
• Lets weapons peek around corners.

name: 'Reactive' Armor Plating
rule:
**Reactive Armor** • **Limited 2**
Reduces 3 DP to 2 DP • 2 uses per game
statLine: Type: Reactive Defense | Blocks 1 DP from 3 DP weapons | Uses: 2

name: 'Targeting' Computer Head
rule: Alternative head option. LOCK-ON ASSIST: When attempting to LOCK with Lock-On weapons, you get +1 to the lock roll. Does not help with firing, only establishing locks.
medium:
• Alternative head.
• +1 to LOCK rolls (Lock-On weapons only).
• Makes establishing locks easier.
statLine: Type: Utility System / Head | Lock-On Assist

name: 'Fortress' Heavy Armor
rule:
**+2 HP** • **Heavy Armor**
-5cm movement

name: 'Aegis' Shield Generator
